content.en:
A shattered space-time bubble, who can break a space-time bubble?

The peak ancient demon-level powerhouses present, as well as the top ancient demon-level powerhouses, were all a little panicked, no wonder even the main department of Ah Luo's mother did not let the peak ancient demon-level powerhouses of the main department explore, obviously because they were afraid of heavy losses, so they let them go.

Of course, this may also be an opportunity, and if you get a lot of benefits from it, you may be able to take off completely.

"Go in, explore a little and come out, and tell me what's going on inside. Aromu said.

"Yes, Lord Aromu Ancient Demon!"

A group of ancient demon-level powerhouses responded.

Immediately, they all entered this shattered bubble of space.

......

As soon as he entered this shattered space-time bubble, a terrifying force suddenly penetrated into his body, making his body very uncomfortable, as if his body was about to be torn apart by a force.

This power was similar to sword qi, a kind of sword wire formed by countless ultimate particles, formless and colorless, filling the void.

And when Ye Tian came in, these 10 kinds of sword filaments would pour into his body, wanting to tear them apart.

Ye Tian tried to shatter these sword wires, but he couldn't.

"It's too tough and powerful, just like ordinary people facing steel bars, and they can't help it at all!"

Ye Tian muttered.

He no longer shattered the sword wires, but kept his body from shattering.

However, he could carry these sword wires, but some of the top Ancient Demon-level powerhouses couldn't bear it.

As soon as they entered, they were invaded by this sword wire, and then their bodies were crushed, and they fell and died on the spot.

......

Ye Tian continued to explore this broken space-time bubble, and everything here seemed to have been crushed, leaving only this endless sword wire, and I don't know how many years have passed, and it still exists here.

"It's time to go out! Tell Lord Aromu about the basic situation here. "

Ye Tian quickly left this broken space-time bubble and came to the endless space-time line.

At this time, not only Ye Tian came out, but also some other ancient demon-level powerhouses also came out.

"Lord Aromu Ancient Demon, in the broken space-time bubble......"

Ye Tian briefly explained the situation inside.

After listening to this, the expression of the ancient demon of Aromu remained unchanged.

Ye Tian didn't say that the first Gu Demon-level powerhouse he said, the Arrow Mu Ancient Demon naturally understood, and every Ancient Demon-level powerhouse came out to say that the situation was similar.

"Alright, let's go in!"

The Ancient Demon Dao of Aromu.

As a result, Ye Tian and other ancient demon-level powerhouses entered this broken space-time bubble again and continued to explore.

Meanwhile.

The other Ultimate Ancient Demons in the main department of Arrow Mother informed those peak ancient demon-level powerhouses in the main department, informing them of the actual situation, and if anyone was willing to enter this broken space-time bubble, they would be sent by the ultimate ancient demons.

Immediately, there were some peak ancient demon-level powerhouses who were willing to come over.

After all, they already knew that the danger of this shattered space-time bubble was not great, and it would be too timid for them to dare to enter!

After that, the Aloye Ancient Demon sent a group of peak Ancient Demon level powerhouses over.

As for the top Ancient Demon-level powerhouses, they are absolutely not allowed to come over, because there are many top-level Ancient Demon-level powerhouses who have already fallen, and they can't bear the power of the sword silk in this broken space-time bubble.

......

Broken in the bubble of space.

Ye Tian continued to explore, and soon had a harvest.

In the midst of nothingness, Ye Tian found a giant mountain, this giant mountain was gray all over, like a whole, and it seemed to be a boulder.

And on this boulder, Ye Tian sensed a sharp force, as if he had gone through countless sword baptisms for countless years to achieve such a mountain.

It could also be called Sword Mountain!

Ye Tian sat cross-legged on this sword mountain, feeling the power contained in it, and gradually felt something.

He felt that if he sat here for an endless time, he might be able to create another Extreme Path Ultimate Arcane, and it was also an extremely powerful Extreme Path Ultimate Sword Technique, and he was afraid that it was still above the Demon Blade.

"It's very good here, let's let a replica body come here to enlighten!"

So, Ye Tian copied a copy of the body, and it was here that he began to enlighten.

Those peak ancient demon-level powerhouses don't have the patience to comprehend countless years here, isn't that a waste of time!

Soon, another replica body condensed, and Ye Tian asked this replica body to explore other places, but if there were other treasures.

Wow!

Ye Tian kept shuttling and exploring the area.

He had thought there were no other creatures in the shattered space-time bubble, but he quickly knew he was wrong.

this day.

A sword light slashed in, and its terrifying attack power shocked Ye Tiandu.

Boom!!!

Ye Tian's armor of Aromu was shattered, and relying on the fifth form of Aro's golden body form and the secret method of space-time form, he ignored this blow, but was also shocked and flew out.

Then, he looked at a strange creature.

This creature was transparent, exuding a terrifying sword glow, like a sharp sword, and there was no trace of talent on it.

Because of this, his copy talent didn't detect the creature.

"A special creature comparable to a top-level Ancient Demon-level powerhouse!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Rather than anything, he is willing to call it a product of rules, but with the ability to attack. []

Immediately, Ye Tian and his body killed, it only had attack power and speed, and its defense power was not good at all.

Ye Tian only cast the Demon Blade, shattering its body with a single blow, killing it, and after the death of this creature, a sword-shaped crystal appeared.

Ye Tian didn't know this sword-shaped crystal, but he also knew that the value of this thing was not low.

Immediately, he began to study the sword-shaped crystal, wanting to know what it was for.

I thought it would be difficult to study, but it turned out to be easy to study.

This thing turned out to be a product of the ultimate rule of the Extreme Dao, specifically the product of the ultimate rule of the Extreme Dao of the sword.

The ultimate rule also has the realm of the Extreme Dao, that is, the realm of the Ultimate Ancient Demon, and the ultimate rule of this realm is derived to the extreme, which is the ultimate rule of the Extreme Dao.

If you use this sword-shaped crystal to comprehend this ultimate rule of the Extreme Dao, you may be able to improve your own ultimate rules of ten thousand laws, let your own ultimate rules of ten thousand laws complete the transformation, and have part of the power of the ultimate rules of the extreme path of the sword.
